isolation_attestation.filesystem_reads: Only paths inside the pilot directory were listed, opened, probed, decoded, hashed or viewed.
isolation_attestation.filesystem_writes: Only paths inside the pilot directory were created, modified or removed.
isolation_attestation.network_exception: Public Apple/iTunes catalog metadata and public catalog preview URLs were used after explicit authorization. No product repository, target, reference, prior plan, or target-derived URL was accessed.
isolation_attestation.commercial_preview_retention: All downloaded catalog preview audio and decoded derivatives were removed before submission.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath '<pilot>/brief.md'
tool_invocations.result_summary: Read the complete 1,617-byte pilot brief first.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Get-ChildItem -Force -LiteralPath '<pilot>'; Get-ChildItem -Force -LiteralPath '<pilot>/inputs'
tool_invocations.result_summary: Found brief.md, inputs/source-a.mp4 (2,848,396 bytes), and inputs/source-b.mp4 (3,806,933 bytes).

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffprobe -v error -show_format -show_streams -of json inputs/source-a.mp4; repeat for source-b.mp4
tool_invocations.result_summary: Both sources are 640x360 H.264, 30 fps, stereo AAC 44.1 kHz; durations 57.598005 and 68.233333 seconds.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: New-Item analysis; ffmpeg fps=1/2,scale,tile contact sheets for both inputs
tool_invocations.result_summary: Created two 2-second-interval visual contact sheets.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: View both original-detail contact sheets
tool_invocations.result_summary: Established that both files are takes of the same solo dance and identified setup, active phrase and camera-return regions.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffmpeg fps=2,scale=256:144,tile=10x6 over source A 0-30/30-58 and source B 0-30/30-60/60-68
tool_invocations.result_summary: Created half-second visual surveys for exact phrase localization.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: View all five half-second survey sheets at original detail
tool_invocations.result_summary: Located the strongest leg, arm, wide-stance and finishing phrases; noted the background passerby in source B's middle section.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffmpeg decode each source audio to mono 8 kHz WAV; run silencedetect and ebur128 on each source
tool_invocations.result_summary: Created analysis WAVs; continuous audio was present. The verbose ebur128 console output exceeded display limits but processing completed.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffmpeg loudnorm=print_format=json and silencedetect=-40dB:d=0.25 for each source
tool_invocations.result_summary: Measured source A at -21.07 LUFS, source B at -20.46 LUFS; no qualifying silence intervals were emitted.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Create pure-standard-library onset/tempo analysis script
python analysis/analyze_audio.py
tool_invocations.result_summary: Source-B leading tempo estimate was 108.1 BPM; source-A room capture produced weak/ambiguous candidates.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffmpeg fps=4 contact sheets for source A 14-30/30-46/46-54 and source B 20-36/36-52/52-68
View all six 4 fps contact sheets at original detail
tool_invocations.result_summary: Made final shot selections and isolated clean source-B ranges before/after the passerby.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Create custom 5x7 pixel-font PNG generator using Python standard library
python analysis/make_text_assets.py
tool_invocations.result_summary: Stopped on missing glyph C after writing the first text asset; KeyError was retained in this audit.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Add the missing C glyph
python analysis/make_text_assets.py
View all three text PNGs
tool_invocations.result_summary: Detected right-edge truncation on LET IT LAND.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Make pixel scale dynamic so long text fits the 900px banner
python analysis/make_text_assets.py
Re-view corrected LET IT LAND asset
Create ffmpeg preview filter graph with nine exact trims, blurred 9:16 bed, sharp foreground crops, text overlays and metronome output labels

ffmpeg -i source-a -i source-b -loop text PNG inputs -f lavfi aevalsrc 108-BPM metronome -filter_complex_script analysis/preview-filter.txt -map video/audio -t 17.777778 -c:v libx264 -c:a aac source-only-preview.mp4
tool_invocations.result_summary: Renderer exceeded the initial 10-second yield window and continued under cell id 23.

Wait 10 seconds on render cell 23
Wait 10 seconds on render cell 23
Wait 10 seconds on render cell 23
tool_invocations.result_summary: Render completed in 54 seconds: 1080x1920 H.264, 534 frames, synthetic mono AAC; no source or catalog audio mapped.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffprobe source-only-preview.mp4; ffmpeg fps=2 vertical contact sheet
tool_invocations.result_summary: Verified 17.8 seconds, 1080x1920, 30 fps, 534 video frames, mono 48 kHz AAC.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: View preview contact sheet at original detail
tool_invocations.result_summary: Visual QA passed: subject remains legible, text fits, background is clean, and the energy arc reads.

Add arbitrary WAV CLI support to analysis/analyze_audio.py
Invoke-WebRequest three lawful Apple preview URLs to local analysis files
ffprobe the three catalog previews; ffmpeg decode each to mono 8 kHz WAV
tool_invocations.result_summary: Each preview was approximately 30 seconds.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: python analysis/analyze_audio.py catalog-woman-8k.wav catalog-levitating-8k.wav catalog-take-your-time-8k.wav
tool_invocations.result_summary: Leading estimates: Woman 108.1 BPM, Levitating 104.3 BPM, take your time about 112 BPM. Woman was the closest stable fit.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Invoke-RestMethod iTunes Search API for Doja Cat Kiss Me More
Download lawful Kiss Me More Apple preview; ffprobe; decode to mono 8 kHz WAV; analyze tempo
tool_invocations.result_summary: Estimated approximately 110-112 BPM; Woman remained the better candidate fit.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: ffmpeg select=gt(scene,0.08),showinfo on source-only-preview.mp4
tool_invocations.result_summary: Confirmed major visible cut frames at 1.133333, 2.266667, 4.5, 8.966667, 11.2 and 15.666667 seconds; same-source cuts below threshold were reconstructed from the 30 fps filter timeline.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Write the three core creative deliverables

tool_invocations.result_summary: Both JSON files parsed; preview reconfirmed as 17.8 seconds/534 frames; all temporary visual, audio, script, filter and catalog-preview artifacts were deleted after an absolute-path containment check.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: First PowerShell SHA-256 collection attempt
tool_invocations.result_summary: PowerShell parser rejected an empty pipe element; no files changed.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Get-Item and Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 for both inputs and all completed deliverables except read-log/freeze
tool_invocations.result_summary: Captured byte sizes and SHA-256 values used by freeze.json.

tool_invocations.command_or_action: Write this audit log

final_outputs_written: freeze.json (written last by the finalization protocol below)

finalization_protocol.action: Parse read-log.json and compute its SHA-256/byte size; also re-check the already captured hashes without modifying any file.
Write freeze.json with hashes for both inputs and every non-receipt deliverable. This is the last filesystem write.

receipt_self_hash_policy: freeze.json does not hash itself because a file cannot contain its own stable cryptographic hash. It hashes every other deliverable plus both inputs.
